mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medir_shift_type ( type_code, name_zh, sort_order, is_rest, is_duty_zhong, is_duty_da, is_qiban, is_small_night, counts_daytime_headcount, counts_weekend_full_day_stat, counts_as_zhong_for_structure, counts_as_lin_for_structure, next_day_must_rest, enabled ) VALUES ( #{typeCode}, #{nameZh}, #{sortOrder}, #{isRest}, #{isDutyZhong}, #{isDutyDa}, #{isQiban}, #{isSmallNight}, #{countsDaytimeHeadcount}, #{countsWeekendFullDayStat}, #{countsAsZhongForStructure}, #{countsAsLinForStructure}, #{nextDayMustRest}, #{enabled} )
mapper.update: UPDATE medir_shift_type SET type_code = #{typeCode}, name_zh = #{nameZh}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, is_rest = #{isRest}, is_duty_zhong = #{isDutyZhong}, is_duty_da = #{isDutyDa}, is_qiban = #{isQiban}, is_small_night = #{isSmallNight}, counts_daytime_headcount = #{countsDaytimeHeadcount}, counts_weekend_full_day_stat = #{countsWeekendFullDayStat}, counts_as_zhong_for_structure = #{countsAsZhongForStructure}, counts_as_lin_for_structure = #{countsAsLinForStructure}, next_day_must_rest = #{nextDayMustRest}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM medir_shift_type ORDER BY sort_order, id
